testcase.name: test_manuscript_has_multiple_sections

error.message: failed on setup with "AssertionError: Expected at least 2 sections, got 1 assert 1 >= 2 + where 1 = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf97b10042900>('total_sections', 0) + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf97b10042900> = {'age_range': 'Adult', 'comparable_books': ['The Girl on the Train by Paula Hawkins', 'Big Little Lies by Liane Moriarty', 'The Cabin at the End of the World by Paul Tremblay'], 'created_at': '2026-03-01T02:41:39.991831+00:00', 'genre': 'psychological thriller', ...}.get"

testcase.error: backend/tests/test_double_connection_guard.py:59: in fresh_manuscript assert data.get("total_sections", 0) >= 2, \ E AssertionError: Expected at least 2 sections, got 1 E assert 1 >= 2 E + where 1 = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf97b10042900>('total_sections', 0) E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf97b10042900> = {'age_range': 'Adult', 'comparable_books': ['The Girl on the Train by Paula Hawkins', 'Big Little Lies by Liane Moriarty', 'The Cabin at the End of the World by Paul Tremblay'], 'created_at': '2026-03-01T02:41:39.991831+00:00', 'genre': 'psychological thriller', ...}.get
